Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I'll just stay inside today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}I was actually gonna go to the film festival with my friend, but now she says she can't go.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}I was honestly looking forward to it, so it's kind of a bummer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari seems interested in[n]going to the film festival.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що наші стосунки можуть стати міцнішими завдяки[n]Персоні {f 2 4 1}, {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I invite Yukari to the film festival?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I hope you're into the kinda stuff they're showing today, though, 'cause we'll be seeing a lot of it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari seems excited.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I invite Yukari to the film festival?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry, I wasn't trying to guilt you into taking me or anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I do hate going alone, so yeah, let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari seems excited.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Look at that idiot... How can he eat hot food when it's already scorching in here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}I feel like I'm getting hotter just watching him![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}You think you could get him out of here for a little? He's seriously starting to bother me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2054 0 0}Geez, Yuka-tan, sorry to "bother" you so much... But I'll make it up to ya![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, you can have half! But you gotta use my chopsticks, 'cause I don't have any spares.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whatever. I'm gonna go do my homework. If I can even focus on it in this heat...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari seems busy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я сумніваюсь, що вона в настрої[n]йти в кіно...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1078 0 0}All of those movies were great, but more importantly... there was air conditioning![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Haha, I'm just kidding. I really had fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Thanks for inviting me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}I promised myself I'd do my homework first thing, but my room was too hot, so I came out here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}My friend's coming to compare notes, so I have to finish... Ugh, sorry, I'm rambling. Just ignore me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari seems busy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я сумніваюсь, що вона в настрої[n]йти в кіно...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}I'm almost done with my homework.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Every year, I tell myself I should just finish my homework in July, but then I never actually do it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}At least I'm not as bad as Junpei. I bet he hasn't even started.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}He can beg all he wants, but I'm not gonna let him copy off mine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari seems busy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я сумніваюсь, що вона в настрої[n]йти в кіно...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}He'd better get started on that homework, or he'll be in trouble.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}As for me, I'm all done! I've got so much stuff I gotta catch up on now that I have free time again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari seems to have already made plans.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я сумніваюсь, що вона в настрої[n]йти в кіно...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Аркана Помірності[n]може зараз допомогти мені поглибити наші стосунки...[n]{f 1 1}
